title: Teradyne Inc. (TER) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: DCF analysis for Teradyne, applying a higher discount rate reflecting its elevated beta (1.8) and cyclical semiconductor end-markets, despite strong secular tailwinds in advanced testing.
valuation: Significantly overvalued relative to a conservative DCF using current FCF. The market is pricing in sustained, explosive growth driven by AI and advanced packaging cycles, ignoring inherent cyclicality.
